prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-KNEEPADS-2PC Product Type: KNEE_PAD Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 2pc Heavy Duty Plastic Cap Knee Pads Description: If you're someone who regularly participates in manual labor, you understand the importance of a good pair of knee pads to protect and support your knees, back, joints and more. Whatever back-breaking, sweat-inducing work you're taking on, like gardening, painting, roofing, flooring or landscaping to name just a few. It is tough enough as it is without adding sore joints and bruised knees into the mix. Insert comfortable, adjustable and protective knee pads here, so you can take on home or work projects without bruising, stiffness or pain to hold you back.

Our knees are the most weight-bearing joints in our body, absorbing shock and supporting us in every move our body makes. If you're planning to spend a lot of time at work or at home completing a project that has you on your knees, or constantly adjusting from standing to kneeling, you should be wearing knee pads for safety, protection, support and injury prevention.

Durable, multifunctional and easily adjustable, these knee pads can be worn for a multitude of different activities like gardening, construction, landscaping, DIY projects around the house or installing flooring. Notably, these knee pads can be used in sport situations and are suitable for skateboarding, hiking or trekking, volleyball and rock climbing for knee protection.

Made with heavy-duty plastic knee caps, easy to adjust hook and loop fasteners and comfortable terylene cloth construction, these knee pads make for a durable, long-lasting pair of knee protection and joint support no matter what project you plan to take on. Search Terms: knee pad foam cushion outdoor activities gardening seat cushion kneeling Features: - ADJUSTABLE TAILORED FIT: Adjustable elastic straps with hook and loop fasteners allow these knee pads to be tailored to the physiology of your knees; easy to put on, adjust and remove, the knee pads can be worn for long periods of time, as they can be tailored to your individual needs - INJURY AND JOINT PREVENTION: The most weight-bearing joint in our body, our knees absorb shock and support us in every kind of activity we do; having extra joint support with knee pads, especially if you're planning to be kneeling a lot is paramount for the longevity of your knee health - MINIMIZE PAIN: These protective knee pads help protect you from experiencing chronic joint issues such as bursitis or arthritis and can help to minimize strains, pains and aches on your knees when taking on any kind of work or DIY home project - MULTI PURPOSE KNEE PADS: These durable safety protection knee pads are great for a multitude of activities including gardening, installing flooring, roofing, landscaping, construction, automotive or mechanic work, home improvement and DIY projects, cleaning and more; they are also suitable for rock climbing, volleyball, skateboarding and general joint support - QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Heavy duty plastic knee caps and comfortable, breathable terylene cloth panels panels make for a pair or durable, long lasting knee pads for all your work and leisure activities === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
